name: youtility-tools
description: Youtility tools + YoutilityKnock dashboard, deployed to one Firebase Hosting site.

scripts.build:app: npm --prefix youtilityknock-web install && npm --prefix youtilityknock-web run build
scripts.build:functions: npm --prefix youtilityknock-web/functions install && npm --prefix youtilityknock-web/functions run build
scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run assemble
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:functions && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && firebase deploy --only hosting
